title: Legacy Modpack Resources
description: The resources used in Lasting Legacy's modpacks
body: # Legacy Modpack Resources [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) [](https://ko-fi.com/omoso) **This requires the Legacy4J mod.** Legacy Modpack Resources is a resource pack that adds on additional content for two of the official Legacy4J modpacks, Re-Console and Simply Legacy. It can work with any modpack using Legacy4J! [](https://modrinth.com/collection/72AM2FL7) ![Main Menu screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WUq4Lff9/images/c8801a18a8bd8fae0c749a30a58acfb0f6cdb731.png) # Features - A new panorama based on the version being played on (currently 1.21.x) # Credits - NicSonic for the Re-Console Edition logo - RedRain0o0 for the Disc Hunt lang file - Cjnator38 for the Panoramas - PigZone for the Legacy Mechanics Addon resource pack - Jab125 for the Legacy Skin Packs Ordering resource pack - ContinuedOak for the Default Skin Pack # Need a server? [![BisectHosting Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d811a958c28645cf1007ccc3d90cb282921bf7f.webp)](https://bh.naomieow.xyz/raamviot50)
